overview.description: The Defiance Nasdaq 100 LightningSpread Income ETF (QLDY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund aims to distribute to shareholders twice weekly through actively managed synthetic call options and writing 0DTE put spreads. The fund also seeks to provide long exposure to the price return of the NASDAQ 100 Index. QLDY was launched on Sep 17, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
